summary: Highlights from Jurek's 'Eat and Run' — patience over speed, fueling on long efforts, and running as a moving meditation.

title: Eat and Run

summary: Highlights from Mollick ch. 3 — 'always invite AI to the table'; the 'worst AI you will ever use' reframe.

summary: Highlights from Newport's 'Deep Work' — the deep/shallow split, attention residue, and scheduling depth like a meeting.

title: Deep Work

summary: Notes on Matuschak's 'Evergreen notes' essay — notes should be atomic, concept-oriented, and densely linked so insight accretes.
author: Andy Matuschak
title: Evergreen notes

summary: Highlights from Ahrens' 'How to Take Smart Notes' — the Zettelkasten loop, writing in your own words, the slip-box as a thinking partner.
